title: 38+ year General Contracting and Remodeling Business
reasonForSelling: Owner is retiring after almost 39 years.
supportTraining: Will consider staying on for 3-6 months or longer if needed to transition to the new owners.
description:
Established General Contracting and Remodeling Business - 37+ Years of Excellence

This well-established general contracting and remodeling business has been serving the Dallas/Fort Worth metroplex since 1988, building a reputation for quality work and exceptional customer service. Located in Arlington, Texas, this turnkey operation represents an outstanding opportunity for an entrepreneur seeking to acquire a profitable construction business with significant growth potential.

Business Overview:
With nearly four decades of continuous operation, this company has developed a strong market presence and loyal customer base. The business generates $1.2 million in annual revenue with impressive cash flow of $655,000, demonstrating exceptional profitability and operational efficiency. Operating with just 3 employees, the company achieves remarkable productivity levels, completing $750K-$1.2M in projects annually.

Key Strengths:
• Strong referral-driven business model with established customer relationships
• Robust online presence generating 500-800 website inquiries weekly
• Active participation in national remodeling organizations
• Well-recognized corporate brand with excellent reputation
• Strategic location providing access to the entire DFW market
• Proven track record of consistent profitability over 37+ years
• Lean operational structure with high profit margins

Growth Potential:
The current owner operates with minimal staffing, presenting tremendous expansion opportunities. With the addition of key personnel including an office manager, marketing representative, and dedicated salesperson, new ownership could potentially increase annual revenues by 5X or more. The strong foundation of referrals and web inquiries provides an excellent platform for scaling operations.

Financing:
Seller financing is available for qualified buyers, making this acquisition more accessible. The owner is committed to ensuring a smooth transition and will consider staying on for 3-6 mo
